title: melampyrum paludosum
intro: Melampyrum paludosum, also known as Marsh Lousewort, is a plant species in the family Orobanchaceae. This parasitic plant obtains its nutrients by drawing them from the roots of nearby plants, typically grasses. The medicinal properties of Melampyrum paludosum include its antispasmodic, antihistamine, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include relief from respiratory issues, allergies, and digestive problems, and it can be prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for its medicinal properties.
